creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Poudriere testport looks good. I like a pkg-plist more than using the Makefile so add one.

Upstream sais: "Checking in changes prior to tagging of version v1.1.6"
https://github.com/x-motemen/ghq/releases/tag/v1.1.6

So maybe lets wait a bit before commiting as I am unsure what they mean.
